title: Learn about your taxes - Canada.ca
content:
## Learn about your taxes
Develop an understanding of how the Canadian tax system works
Take this online course to learn about personal income taxes in Canada.
- Purpose
                            of taxes An introduction to what taxes are, why they are collected, and how Canada's tax system works. 4 lessons 21 minutes total

### Purpose
                            of taxes
An introduction to what taxes are, why they are collected, and how Canada's tax system works.
- Starting
                            to work What you need to know when you start working, why you need a social insurance number (SIN), and
                        your responsibilities when reporting your income. 2 lessons 8 minutes total Working for an employer When to fill out a TD1 form, and what’s on your pay stub and T4 slip. 3 lessons 27 minutes total Working for yourself Understanding self-employment income and your responsibilities, how to manage your goods and
                        services tax/harmonized sales tax (GST/HST) account, and how to report your income. 3 lessons 19 minutes total

### Starting
                            to work
What you need to know when you start working, why you need a social insurance number (SIN), and
                        your responsibilities when reporting your income.

#### Working for an employer
When to fill out a TD1 form, and what’s on your pay stub and T4 slip.

#### Working for yourself
Understanding self-employment income and your responsibilities, how to manage your goods and
                        services tax/harmonized sales tax (GST/HST) account, and how to report your income.
- Preparing
                            to do your taxes Find out what you’ll need to know before doing your taxes and the different ways to do them. 3 lessons 27 minutes total

### Preparing
                            to do your taxes
Find out what you’ll need to know before doing your taxes and the different ways to do them.
- Completing
                            a basic tax return An introduction to a basic income tax and benefit return. What you need to report, how to claim
                        deductions and tax credits, and finding out whether you will get a refund or owe tax. 7 lessons 76 minutes total

### Completing
                            a basic tax return
An introduction to a basic income tax and benefit return. What you need to report, how to claim
                        deductions and tax credits, and finding out whether you will get a refund or owe tax.
- After
                            sending us your tax return What you’ll need to know after you’ve done your taxes, including understanding your notice of
                        assessment, paying off a balance owing, and interacting with the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA). 4 lessons 38 minutes total

### After
                            sending us your tax return
What you’ll need to know after you’ve done your taxes, including understanding your notice of
                        assessment, paying off a balance owing, and interacting with the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA).
- Accessing
                            your benefits and credits Some of the benefits and credits the CRA administers, what you might be eligible for, and how to
                        keep getting your benefit payments. 2 lessons 19 minutes total

### Accessing
                            your benefits and credits
Some of the benefits and credits the CRA administers, what you might be eligible for, and how to
                        keep getting your benefit payments.
- Saving for the future An introduction to various registered plans, what they are, and how to open them. 1 lesson 10 minutes total

### Saving for the future
An introduction to various registered plans, what they are, and how to open them.
- Using
                            My Account The services available through this online portal, how to access them, and why you may want to
                        register. 2 lessons 12 minutes total

### Using
                            My Account
The services available through this online portal, how to access them, and why you may want to
                        register.
- Multimedia
                                gallery
- Common
                                tax terms
- New!
                                Exercise – Calculate a refund or a balance owing
- Taxology
                                podcast
